title: [ImportVerilog] Implements First(), Last(), Next() and Prev()
body: Implements `.First()`, `.Last()`, `.Next()`, `.Prev()` from IEEE Std 1800™-2023 7.9.4-7. Indexes variables are passed in by reference so I updated `Expressions.cpp` to use `.convertLvalueExpression` on the second values of these system calls.
